overview: SynergenX provides customized testosterone replacement therapy (TRT) for men and hormone replacement therapy (HRT) for women, along with medically supervised weight loss therapy. All treatments are tailored to individual hormone levels and supervised by board-certified professionals.
highlights: Customized TRT and HRT based on individual hormone levels
Medically supervised GLP-1 weight loss therapy
targetAudience: Men with low testosterone and women experiencing menopause or perimenopause seeking personalized hormone optimization.
